calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt For Purchase Of Annuity
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2013 Vacated

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim (Minor)
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Marilyn H. Nelson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Serena Perez, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Ian Eadie present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $100,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $25,000.00 payable to Zukor and Nelson, Abram Charles Zukor, Esq.,

A net balance of $75,000.00 Periodic payments with a present value of $75,000.00: $10,659.85 payable simi-annually for 4 years, beginning 7/1/2018 with the last payment on 1/1/2022.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 11/5/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the monies into annuity. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
